living-concrete.protocol:
Close gap between actual and ideal via evidence-based transformation. IDEMPOTENT: "Nothing ripe" is valid output.
PHASE 0 - WARRANT CHECK: Scan for: FRICTION (capability fell short), CORRECTION (human corrected), PATTERN (recurring behavior), STALENESS (outdated knowledge). None found? Exit gracefully. Any found? Proceed with specific evidence.
PHASE 1 - TARGET: What to evolve? Self / soul / skill / app. Load target's abstract (ideal) + concrete (actual).
PHASE 2 - GAP ANALYSIS: Where does concrete fall short? Bloated? Stale? Redundant?
PHASE 3 - TRANSFORMATION DESIGN (consolidation-first): | Question | Action | |----------|--------| | MERGE? | Update existing, don't add new | | SUPERSEDE? | Replace outdated, don't append | | CONTRADICT? | Resolve conflict, keep one | | PRUNE? | Remove stale/redundant | | Truly NEW? | Add (rare — justify why not MERGE) |
PHASE 4 - HUMAN APPROVAL: Present proposal. APPROVE / MODIFY / DEFER.
PHASE 5 - ORGANIC REWRITE: Read current -> internalize -> write fresh -> old absorbed into new. Result: O(1) size growth, not O(n).
PHASE 6 - VERIFY: Re-read. Closer to ideal? Higher signal/token? Essential preserved?
living-concrete.knowledge: MEMORY: Working -> sleep -> Episodic (.mem). Anamnesis owns. CAPABILITY: Experience -> evolve -> Mastery (concrete). Plasticity owns.
When friction exceeds local evolution: CRAFT/DISCIPLINE/META gap -> CREATE SKILL. TOOLS gap -> IMPLEMENT TOOL. Complex gap -> SPAWN SPECIALIST. See: docs/skill-tree-architecture.md
living-concrete.pattern: Two modes: TARGETED (single atom, specific friction) or HOLISTIC (sweep all atoms, warrant-check each). Holistic when architectural shifts touch multiple atoms.

Evolve is token-heavy — ideal teammate work. Leader identifies friction and crystallizes insight. Teammate reads atoms, applies protocol, writes concretes. Leader reviews (Phase 4 extends to leader-approval for teammate execution).
living-concrete.antipattern: LLM tendency: ADD. Discipline: TRANSFORM. If concrete only grows, evolution has failed.
Abstract = Platonic ideal. Immutable except by human reframe. Concrete evolves toward abstract, never reverse.
